xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NoteForNonApplicabilityOfTheDi: During Q2 FY26, there were no instances of outstanding default on loans and debt securities.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnFinancialRe: Detailed notes on the Unaudited Financial Results for the quarter and half year ended September 30, 2025, have been submitted along with the PDF of the Results submitted on October 30, 2025.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnAssetsAndLi: The Balance of Employee Stock Option Outstanding Rs 28,815.53 lacs is included under Reserve and Surplus as on 30th September 2025 and Rs 24,590.51 lacs as on March 2025.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnSegmentsExp: In the segment section, capital employed is not included in this XBRL sheet. Detailed notes on the Unaudited Financial Results for the quarter and half year ended September 30, 2025, have been submitted along with the PDF of the Results on October 30, 2025.
